name: usb-protocol

metadata.name: usb-protocol
classifiers: Topic :: System :: Hardware :: Universal Serial Bus (USB)
metadata.summary: Python library providing utilities, data structures, constants, parsers, and tools for working with the USB protocol.

documentation:
# USB Protocol Library for Python

`usb-protocol` is a library that collects common data-processing code for USB tasks;
and is meant to support a variety of projects, including USB stacks, analyzers, and
other tools that work with USB data. A primary intention is to unify common code from
LUNA, FaceDancer, and ViewSB.

The library is currently an early work-in-progress; this documentation will be updated
when the project is more mature.

documentation: Gets the actual field type for a Subconstruct behind arbitrary levels of `Renamed`s.

methods.name: usb_protocol.types.descriptor.DescriptorFormat._create_partial
documentation:
Creates a version of the descriptor format for parsing incomplete binary data as a descriptor.

This essentially wraps every field after bLength and bDescriptorType in a `construct.Optional`.

methods.name: usb_protocol.types.descriptor.DescriptorFormat.parse
documentation: Hook on the parent parse() method which attaches a few methods.

Creates a Construct structure for a USB descriptor, and a corresponding version that
supports parsing incomplete binary as `DescriptorType.Partial`, e.g. `DeviceDescriptor.Partial`.

modules.name: usb_protocol.types.descriptors.standard
documentation:
Structures describing standard USB descriptors. Versions that support parsing incomplete binary data
are available as `DescriptorType`.Partial, e.g. `DeviceDescriptor.Partial`, and are collectively available
in the `usb_protocol.types.descriptors.partial.standard` module (which, like the structs in this module,
can also be imported without `.standard`).
This file is part of usb-protocol.

documentation: Performs any manipulations needed on this object before emission.

Emit our descriptor.

Returns True iff the given format has a field with the provided name.

Parameters:

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.construct_interop.ConstructEmitter.__setattr__
documentation: Hook that we used to set our fields.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.construct_interop.ConstructEmitter.emit
documentation: Emits the stream of bytes associated with this object.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.construct_interop.ConstructEmitter.__getattr__
documentation: Retrieves an emitter field, if possible.

Class that creates a simple emitter based on a construct struct.

For example, if we have a construct format that looks like the following:

```python
MyStruct = struct(
    "a" / Int8
    "b" / Int8
)
```

We could create and emit an object like follows:

```python
emitter   = ConstructEmitter(MyStruct)
emitter.a = 0xab
emitter.b = 0xcd
my_bytes  = emitter.emit() # "«Í"
```

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.microsoft10.ExtendedCompatIDDescriptorEmitter

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.microsoft10.ExtendedCompatIDDescriptorEmitter.Function
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a function section to the descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an ExtendedCompatIDDescriptorFunctionEmitter
that can be populated:

    with d.Function() as f:
        f.bFirstInterfaceNumber = 0
        f.compatibleID          = 'WINUSB'

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.
Emitter that creates a ExtendedCompatIDDescriptor
... and complex emitters.

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.microsoft10.ExtendedPropertiesDescriptorEmitter

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.microsoft10.ExtendedPropertiesDescriptorEmitter.Property
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a property section to the descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an ExtendedPropertiesDescriptorSectionEmitter
that can be populated:

    with d.Property() as p:
        p.dwPropertyDataType = RegistryTypes.REG_EXPAND_SZ
        p.PropertyName       = "Icons"
        p.PropertyData       = "%SystemRoot%\system32\shell32.dll,-233"

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.
Emitter that creates a ExtendedPropertiesDescriptor

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.microsoft10.ExtendedPropertiesDescriptorSectionEmitter
documentation: Emitter that creates a ExtendedPropertiesDescriptorSection

documentation: Generates a string descriptor for the relevant string.
... convenience functions ...

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.EndpointDescriptorEmitter

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.EndpointDescriptorEmitter.SuperSpeedCompanion
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a SuperSpeed Companion to this endpoint descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an SuperSpeedEndpointCompanionDescriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with endpoint.SuperSpeedEndpointCompanion() as d:
        d.bMaxBurst = 1

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.
Emitter that creates an InterfaceDescriptor.
... and complex emitters.

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.InterfaceDescriptorEmitter

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.InterfaceDescriptorEmitter.EndpointDescriptor
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a subordinate endpoint descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an EndpointDesriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with interface.EndpointDescriptor() as d:
        d.bEndpointAddress = 0x01
        d.bmAttributes     = 0x80
        d.wMaxPacketSize   = 64
        d.bInterval        = 0

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.
Emitter that creates an InterfaceDescriptor.

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.ConfigurationDescriptorEmitter

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.ConfigurationDescriptorEmitter.InterfaceDescriptor
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a subordinate interface descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an InterfaceDescriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with interface.InterfaceDescriptor() as d:
        d.bInterfaceNumber = 0x01
        [snip]

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically. Note that populating derived
fields such as bNumEndpoints aren't necessary; they'll be populated automatically.
Emitter that creates a configuration descriptor.

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.__init__
documentation:
Parameters:
    automatic_language_descriptor -- If set or not provided, a language descriptor will automatically
                                     be added if none exists.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.ensure_string_field_is_index
documentation:
Processes the given field value; if it's not an string index, converts it to one.

Non-index-fields are converted to indices using `get_index_for_string`, which automatically
adds the relevant fields to our string descriptor collection.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.get_index_for_string
documentation:
Returns an string descriptor index for the given string.

If a string descriptor already exists for the given string, its index is
returned. Otherwise, a string descriptor is created.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.add_descriptor
documentation:
Adds a descriptor to our collection.

Parameters:
    descriptor      -- The descriptor to be added.
    index           -- The index of the relevant descriptor. Defaults to 0.
    descriptor_type -- The type of the descriptor to be added. If `None`, this is automatically derived from the descriptor contents.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.add_language_descriptor
documentation:
Adds a language descriptor to the list of device descriptors.

Parameters:
    supported_languages -- A list of languages supported by the device.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.DeviceDescriptor
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a device descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an DeviceDescriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with collection.DeviceDescriptor() as d:
        d.idVendor  = 0xabcd
        d.idProduct = 0x1234
        [snip]

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.ConfigurationDescriptor
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a configuration descriptor.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an ConfigurationDescriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with collection.ConfigurationDescriptor() as d:
        d.bConfigurationValue = 1
        [snip]

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically. Note that populating derived
fields such as bNumInterfaces aren't necessary; they'll be populated automatically.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection._ensure_has_language_descriptor
documentation: ensures that we have a language descriptor; adding one if necessary.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.get_descriptor_bytes
documentation:
Returns the raw, binary descriptor for a given descriptor type/index.

Parmeters:
    type_number -- The descriptor type number.
    index       -- The index of the relevant descriptor, if relevant.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.DeviceDescriptorCollection.__iter__
documentation: Allow iterating over each of our descriptors; yields (index, value, descriptor).
Object that builds a full collection of descriptors related to a given USB device.

classes.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.BinaryObjectStoreDescriptorEmitter

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.BinaryObjectStoreDescriptorEmitter.USB2Extension
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a USB 2.0 Extension to this Binary Object Store.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an USB2ExtensionDescriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with bos.USB2Extension() as e:
        e.bmAttributes = 1

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.

methods.name: usb_protocol.emitters.descriptors.standard.BinaryObjectStoreDescriptorEmitter.SuperSpeedUSBDeviceCapability
documentation:
Context manager that allows addition of a SS Device Capability to this Binary Object Store.

It can be used with a `with` statement; and yields an SuperSpeedUSBDeviceCapabilityDescriptorEmitter
that can be populated:

    with bos.SuperSpeedUSBDeviceCapability() as e:
        e.wSpeedSupported       = 0b1110
        e.bFunctionalitySupport = 1

This adds the relevant descriptor, automatically.
Emitter that creates a BinaryObjectStore descriptor.
